falsification_attempt: Checked whether missing Scheduled/AsyncCommitment SubPool variants imply missing runtime behavior. The v2.2 port routes async through AsyncPool metadata and scheduled obligations through payload/verifier state checks, so putting these back into SubPool would duplicate stale old-design state.
missed_risks: Consumers expecting scheduled or async counts inside PoolSize are not preserved; no current v2.2 consumer was found relying on those old fields.
notes: The regular pending/queued/basefee/blob ordering invariants remain upstream-compatible.
